objective: Organize the dirty SCBE-AETHERMOORE worktree into safe GitHub branches and PR lanes without destructive cleanup or remote history edits.

lanes.name: aap_geoseal_tools
lanes.purpose: Autonomous Agent Prediction packaging, local probing, and Kaggle submission guard.

lanes.name: arc_rubix_tools
lanes.purpose: ARC/Rubix solver, dashboard, loop, and verifier-first search tooling.

lanes.name: package_release_control
lanes.purpose: Controlled package inventory and release-readiness docs.

lanes.name: scratch_quarantine
lanes.purpose: Hold temporary probes and generated artifacts until reviewed.

next_safe_commands: git add bin/geoseal.cjs src/coding_spine/agent_tool_bridge.py scripts/system/aap_family_probe.py scripts/system/aap_blend_probe.py scripts/system/aap_package_submit.py scripts/system/aap_local_meta_eval.py scripts/system/aap_validation_scaffold.py docs/AAP_FAMILY_PROBE.md docs/AAP_BLEND_PROBE.md docs/AAP_GEOSEAL_PACKAGE_GUARD.md docs/github/SCBE_AETHERMOORE_CLEANUP_STRATEGY.md reports/github_cleanup_strategy_20260716.json
git commit -m "feat(geoseal): add AAP package guard and probe workflow"
